title: Never watched EVA in Jap with subs am i missing out
display_title: Never watched EVA in Jap with subs am i missing out
wikitext:
[]: Never watched EVA in Jap with subs, am i missing out? Post by Leon100 » Wed Feb 27, 2008 10:21 pm I think this might be abit of a controversial thing to say but I've watched the series 3 or 4 times and both of the movies. But as of yet I have only watch them in the English Dub, am i missing out? It's not that im lazy as i watch plenty of other anime movies/series with subs. I just find the Dub quality to be pretty good. *runs and hides now*

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 27, 2008 10:26 pm Well if you can stand Tiffany Grant's voice and Spike Spencer's classic scream, then there's nothing wrong with that. I personally prefer the English dub because I can understand it. :3 But to the get the maximum enjoyment out of Evangelion, watch the sub.

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Feb 27, 2008 10:33 pm These may be useful: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3278 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=521 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=49

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 27, 2008 10:37 pm Gonna lock this since no discussion could happen that hasn't happened before.
